case_title: DARREL MIGUEL ADAMS JR VS. THE END UP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY AGNES VICTORIA STEINER--MANAGING PARTNER OF THE END UP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT THE END UP PRESENTS, ANTHONY HEARING SET FOR MAR-02-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ORDER OF EXAMINATION DISCHARGED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE END UP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE END UP PRESENTS, ANTHONY

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR INFOMS THE COURT THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS GIVEN HIM A CHEK FOR $4270.00 THE FULL MAOUNT OWED. THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR DARREL MIGUEL ADAMS JR. IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR ANOTHONY SCHLANDER IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR THE END UP IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ANOTHONY SCHLANDER, PROMOTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADAMS JR, DARREL MIGUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE END UP PRESENTS, ANTHONY $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,105.00, "ALL PARTIES AGREE THAT ANTHONY PRESENTS IS ADDED AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT WAIVING SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE. THE PARTIES AGREE TO DELETE "DBA PHOENIX VENTURE, INC. ", PER JUDGE MITCHELL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
